name: Abyssal Baths
description:
You discover a secluded chamber.

Steam rises from bubbling pools of hot liquid that shifts colors with hypnotic rhythm. Barnacled growths hang from the ceiling, dripping viscous fluid that hisses and writhes when it touches the surface. The air feels heavy, laden with [blue]salt[/blue] and something [green]unmistakably organic[/green].

As you approach the edge of the largest pool, the liquid ripples. The waters bubble more intensely as if anticipating your entry.

pages.description: You decline the temptation of the waters, instead gathering crystalline salts that have formed along the edges. As you apply them to your skin, the pools churn and froth agitatedly. The ambient temperature drops noticeably, and for a moment all reflective surfaces in the room show a version of you that seems hollow-eyed and diminished. You can't shake the feeling of having missed something transformative.
[sine][red]If you bathe any longer you will die.[/red][/sine]

options.title: Linger
options.description: [sine][red]If you bathe any longer you will die.[/red][/sine]

pages.description: The heat finally gets to you, and you hop out of the bath.

The liquid burns against your skin, simultaneously [blue][jitter]freezing[/jitter][/blue] and [red][jitter]scalding[/jitter][/red].

Beneath the surface, something brushes against your legs—tendrils? Currents with purpose? But when the pain subsides, you feel... denser somehow. More substantial. The waters seem to hum with satisfaction.

You discover a secluded chamber.

Steam rises from bubbling pools of hot liquid that shifts colors with hypnotic rhythm. Barnacled growths hang from the ceiling, dripping viscous fluid that hisses and writhes when it touches the surface. The air feels heavy, laden with [blue]salt[/blue] and something [green]unmistakably organic[/green].

As you approach the edge of the largest pool, the liquid ripples. The waters bubble more intensely as if anticipating your entry.

[jitter]The temperature keeps rising![/jitter]

How long can you endure before the steam cooks you from within?

[jitter][orange]It keeps getting hotter![/orange][/jitter]

The pool's bubbling sounds like laughter.

[jitter][red]IT'S SO HOT![/red][/jitter]

You wonder if this is what it's like to live in the Village of Demons?
[sine][purple]You have bathed so long you have lost track of time and your mind...[/purple][/sine]
It's nice in here.
Really fantastic.
You feel great
[sine]Mmm...[/sine]

[sine]Zzz...
..zzzz....[/sine]

name: Amalgamator
description:
[b][jitter]CLANG! CLANG!!![/jitter][/b]

You hear the echoes of metal upon metal on the otherside of a wall...

As you press your head against the wall to listen in—the wall opens up, revealing a [orange]hulking six-armed figure[/orange] toiling away.
Its “face” is a [gold][sine]swirling vortex of glowing sigils[/sine][/gold] that shift about.

“One with an [aqua]Ascending Spirit[/aqua] has found my workshop? Let's get [jitter]COMBINING[/jitter]!”

pages.description:
[b][jitter]CLANG! CLANG!!![/jitter][/b]

The [orange]Amalgamator[/orange] strikes its Bone Anvil.

Memories of combat, protecting, and defensive strategies sharpen with each blow.
Your most ultimate technique returns to you.

[b][jitter]CLANG! CLANG!!![/jitter][/b]

The [orange]Amalgamator[/orange] strikes its Bone Anvil.

Memories of combat, attacking, and offensive strategies sharpen with each blow.
Your most ultimate technique returns to you.

[b][jitter]CLANG! CLANG!!![/jitter][/b]

You hear the echoes of metal upon metal on the otherside of a wall...

As you press your head against the wall to listen in—the wall opens up, revealing a [orange]hulking six-armed figure[/orange] toiling away.
Its “face” is a [gold][sine]swirling vortex of glowing sigils[/sine][/gold] that shift about.

“One with an [aqua]Ascending Spirit[/aqua] has found my workshop? Let's get [jitter]COMBINING[/jitter]!”

name: Aroma of Chaos
description:
Upon trudging through a thick underbrush and making it into a clearing, you're hit with an unplaceable nostalgia.

A mix of [purple]floral scents[/purple], [green]putrid decay[/green], and [orange]something else entirely[/orange]. The scent grows stronger with each step, and you feel as though the world around you is [sine]warping and twisting[/sine].

Overcome with a sense of [sine]shifting chaos[/sine], you begin to lose your sense of self.

pages.description:
Upon trudging through a thick underbrush and making it into a clearing, you're hit with an unplaceable nostalgia.

A mix of [purple]floral scents[/purple], [green]putrid decay[/green], and [orange]something else entirely[/orange]. The scent grows stronger with each step, and you feel as though the world around you is [sine]warping and twisting[/sine].

Overcome with a sense of [sine]shifting chaos[/sine], you begin to lose your sense of self.

You give in and your mind [sine][purple]drifts...[/purple][/sine]
You see yourself [blue]communing with friends[/blue], [green]fighting as a team[/green], and [gold]dueling great foes[/gold]. Is this a dream? Reality? Somehow both? Many sets of eyes perceive you and your dreams. Who are they...?

You awaken after an unknown amount of time.
The aroma weakens and its effects fade as you regain clarity. Upon restabilizing, you're more clearheaded than ever.

[sine][red]What were those eyes?[/red][/sine]

Resisting the temptation to give in, you climb atop a tree where the aroma doesn't reach but its effects claw at your mind.

Maintaining control is difficult; you tether your thoughts to your [blue]Core Principles[/blue].

[AromaPrinciple]
[AromaPrinciple]
[AromaPrinciple]

The aroma subsides.

name: Battleworn Dummy
description:
As you approach, it begins to rumble and fizzle and lights up brilliantly!

“[jitter]BZZZT![/jitter] TIME TO TRAIN!!! YOU HAVE [blue]3 TURNS[/blue] TO DEFEAT ME!
CHOOSE A SETTING OR FACE [red]LETHAL HUMILIATION[/red].
Here are the options:”

After the terrifying message, the dummy carefully reads out detailed instructions.

What do you choose?

options.title: Setting 1
options.description: Fight a [blue]75[/blue] HP dummy. Procure [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Potion[/gold].

options.title: Setting 2
options.description: Fight a [blue]150[/blue] HP dummy. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random cards.

options.title: Setting 3
options.description: Fight a [blue]300[/blue] HP dummy. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

pages.description:
“[jitter][red]YOU ARE WEAK!![/red][/jitter]
HUMILIATION HAS BEEN ADMINISTERED!”

The dummy is silent for a moment and—

“Choose a lower setting next time. Have a nice day.”

As you approach, it begins to rumble and fizzle and lights up brilliantly!

“[jitter]BZZZT![/jitter] TIME TO TRAIN!!! YOU HAVE [blue]3 TURNS[/blue] TO DEFEAT ME!
CHOOSE A SETTING OR FACE [red]LETHAL HUMILIATION[/red].
Here are the options:”

After the terrifying message, the dummy carefully reads out detailed instructions.

What do you choose?

options.title: Setting 1
options.description: Fight a [blue]75[/blue] HP dummy. Procure [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Potion[/gold].

options.title: Setting 2
options.description: Fight a [blue]150[/blue] HP dummy. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random cards.

options.title: Setting 3
options.description: Fight a [blue]300[/blue] HP dummy. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

pages.description:
“[jitter]YOU PASS THE TRAINING![/jitter]
YOU ARE NOW EQUIPPED TO DEFEND THIS [gold]FACTORY[/gold] AGAINST INTRUDERS!! BE SURE TO HYDRATE AFTER TRAINING SESSIONS!”

name: Brain Leech
description:
[jitter]*thunk*[/jitter]

A sharp pain is felt atop your head and a thought stabs into your mind.

[purple][sine]“SHARE KNOWLEDGE???”[/sine][/purple]

You are unsure how to proceed...

options.title: Share Knowledge
options.description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]5[/blue] random cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

options.title: Rip the Leech Off
options.description: Lose [red]5[/red] HP. Gain a Colorless card reward.

pages.description:
[jitter]*thunk*[/jitter]

A sharp pain is felt atop your head and a thought stabs into your mind.

[purple][sine]“SHARE KNOWLEDGE???”[/sine][/purple]

You are unsure how to proceed...

options.title: Share Knowledge
options.description: Choose [blue]1[/blue] of [blue]5[/blue] random cards to add to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

options.title: Rip the Leech Off
options.description: Lose [red]5[/red] HP. Gain a Colorless card reward.

pages.description:
You violently [jitter]rip the leech off your head[/jitter] and chuck it far far away!

There's a voice in your head:
[purple][sine]“NOOOOOOoOoooooOOOOoooo....”

[purple][sine]“HOW OSTENTATIOUSLY SCHOLASTIC OF A LABYRINTHINE MIND!
A VERITABLE CORNUCOPIA OF CEREBRAL SUSTENANCE TO DIGEST!”[/sine][/purple].

Satisfied, the creature pops off and crawls away.
You are [blue]flabbergasted[/blue].

name: Bugslayer
description:
As you're fending off a [jitter][red]swarm of aggressive insects[/red][/jitter] you suddenly notice a [gold]Mighty Rugged Warrior-Man[/gold] fighting beside you this whole time!

The insects, sensing defeat, scatter. You turn to your fellow fighter.
“Would you like any tips on exterminating these pests?”

How polite. You nod and accept his offer.

pages.description: Silently the figure nods at you, and then walks away.

“I see... you wish to learn the [gold]Extermination Technique[/gold]. Very good...”

He pauses briefly, thinking how best to endow you with this maneuver...

[jitter]“THIS IS THE TECHNIQUE! BEHOLD!!”[/jitter]
He boasts while holding up a can of [green]Insecticide[/green].

As you're fending off a [jitter][red]swarm of aggressive insects[/red][/jitter] you suddenly notice a [gold]Mighty Rugged Warrior-Man[/gold] fighting beside you this whole time!

The insects, sensing defeat, scatter. You turn to your fellow fighter.
“Would you like any tips on exterminating these pests?”

How polite. You nod and accept his offer.

“I see... you wish to learn the [gold]Squash Technique[/gold]. Very good...”

He pauses briefly, thinking how best to endow you with this maneuver...

[jitter]“THIS IS THE TECHNIQUE! BEHOLD!!”[/jitter]
He boasts while stepping on a giant bug.

name: Byrdonis Nest
description:
You spot an enormous [jitter][red]Shambling Beast[/red][/jitter] chase off an injured [green][sine]Green Byrd[/sine][/green].

In the alcove the byrd fled from, a [gold]single unguarded egg[/gold] lies abandoned.

[sine]Your stomach gurgles...[/sine]

pages.description:
You crack the egg open and gobble it up.
Good breakfast.

You spot an enormous [jitter][red]Shambling Beast[/red][/jitter] chase off an injured [green][sine]Green Byrd[/sine][/green].

In the alcove the byrd fled from, a [gold]single unguarded egg[/gold] lies abandoned.

[sine]Your stomach gurgles...[/sine]
You gently scoop up the egg and stow it, thinking it may [green]hatch[/green] into something useful later.

name: Colorful Philosophers
description:
Before you is a rather epic sight.
You see 3 different colored statues towering over a dais, having a [jitter][red]heated debate[/red][/jitter] over the philosophical implications of color.

As you listen in, you get a sense that the most important question at hand is which color truly is [gold]THE BEST[/gold].

You chime in with your thoughts.
preconditions: Requires more than one character unlocked

pages.description: Your opinion doesn't seem welcome, and the statues resume their unending debate.

Before you is a rather epic sight.
You see 3 different colored statues towering over a dais, having a [jitter][red]heated debate[/red][/jitter] over the philosophical implications of color.

As you listen in, you get a sense that the most important question at hand is which color truly is [gold]THE BEST[/gold].

You chime in with your thoughts.

name: Colossal Flower
description:
There is a [green]colossal flower[/green] growing atop a [red][jitter]mountain of bones[/jitter][/red].

As its [sine]color-shifting petals[/sine] pulsate, you sense there is a [aqua]Powerful Cluster of Pollen[/aqua] in the center but the undulating petals are [red]razor sharp[/red] and unpredictable.

You could grab some of the [gold]golden nectar[/gold], but reaching the prize in the center is so tempting...

pages.description:
You carefully gather some [gold]nectar[/gold] from the flower's flesh.
The petals shimmer angrily.

Your whole body is numb and messed up from the [purple]toxins[/purple], [red]barbs[/red], and [green]leaves[/green].
Enough is enough.

You stow away a glob of [gold]high-quality nectar[/gold] and retreat.

There is a [green]colossal flower[/green] growing atop a [red][jitter]mountain of bones[/jitter][/red].

As its [sine]color-shifting petals[/sine] pulsate, you sense there is a [aqua]Powerful Cluster of Pollen[/aqua] in the center but the undulating petals are [red]razor sharp[/red] and unpredictable.

You could grab some of the [gold]golden nectar[/gold], but reaching the prize in the center is so tempting...

With a final lunge you grab hold of the [aqua]pollinous core[/aqua]!
The plant shudders violently; its petals go dull, and the [jitter]tingling[/jitter] stops.

The [gold]golden nectar[/gold] becomes worthless muck.
You killed it.

You push past a layer of [red]razor-sharp[/red] petals, they're coated with a [purple]substance[/purple] that makes your skin [jitter]tingle[/jitter]. This seems to numb the pain?

Maybe this is why there is a pile of bones here...

The tingling turns into a [jitter][red]throbbing weakness[/red][/jitter] as you push onwards...

[purple]This flower wants to eat me. Why did I go into it?[/purple]

name: Crystal Sphere
description:
[sine][blue]“I predicted you'd enter...!”[/blue][/sine]

A [jitter]raspy[/jitter] voice calls out as you enter a [purple]mystic hut[/purple].

[sine][blue]“Your destiny has brought you here. We must uncover your future and fortunes so you can SAVE US ALL!!”[/blue][/sine]
“Okay, here are the options for the [gold]Crystal Sphere reading[/gold]. Be sure to sign this waiver as well,” she says while bringing out pen and parchment.

pages.description: I'm done pondering

A [jitter]raspy[/jitter] voice calls out as you enter a [purple]mystic hut[/purple].

[sine][blue]“Your destiny has brought you here. We must uncover your future and fortunes so you can SAVE US ALL!!”[/blue][/sine]
“Okay, here are the options for the [gold]Crystal Sphere reading[/gold]. Be sure to sign this waiver as well,” she says while bringing out pen and parchment.
Payment Plan
Uncover Future

name: Darv
description:
...where did I put... Oh!
Come to see my collection!? Take anything from that pile over there, put it to good use!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Here, take one of these forgotten gems with ya!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
I’ve got things to do today!
Take whatever ya want from that pile!!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: You’re a beautiful hunk of junk, you know that?

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: Still keeping at it, I see... Let’s see if we can upgrade ya!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
I’ve been holding on to your friend’s uhh... um.
Nevermind nevermind!!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: My scrappy scrapper, forget I said all that!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
The flaming warrior has returned!
I’ve got just the thing for ya!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Good to see ya still kickin’ and bashin’ em heads in!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: I’m still holding on to that heavy blade of yours... but I can’t find no one to restore it.

Ironclad.speaker: character
Ironclad.text: The Ironclad stares at Darv.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Maybe the Architect knows somethin’.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: I can tell you’re a serious one. What can I do for ya missy?

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Anything to help me kill a most loathsome man.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Very well then... have a gander!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Still on that warpath? I ain’t gonna stop ya!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: This book seems tied to ya, been around longer than you have.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: How did you come into possession of that?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [sine]Scary[/sine] things have a way of ending up in my collection.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: What brings the likes of you up here? Wanna take a look at my collection?

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I do enjoy fine wares...

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Yeah!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Back for more your highness?!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: To my new friend, do I have somethin’ for ya!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I’m listening!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
I’d give it but the Architect nabbed it from me!!
Help a buddy out! Do me a favor will ya?

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Back in the Spire for you too huh?
Can’t resist those shinies right?!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: I’ll trade ya somethin’ nice for that trophy you got there!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Pity ya don’t remember all my generosity!
Yeah yeah, you know how Neow is...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Well! Let’s get you equipped for that final showdown or whatevah!

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
...where did I put... Oh!
Come to see my collection!? Take anything from that pile over there, put it to good use!

name: Dense Vegetation
description:
Having taken the wrong path for a good while, you find yourself in a thick jungle of [green]ferns[/green], [green]shrubs[/green], and [green]vines[/green]. Especially [green]vines[/green]. Exhaustion sets in, and a dark thought comes to mind:

[sine][purple]“You are lost, unprepared, and the inevitability of death is approaching.”[/purple][/sine]

What do you do?

pages.description:
Having taken the wrong path for a good while, you find yourself in a thick jungle of [green]ferns[/green], [green]shrubs[/green], and [green]vines[/green]. Especially [green]vines[/green]. Exhaustion sets in, and a dark thought comes to mind:

[sine][purple]“You are lost, unprepared, and the inevitability of death is approaching.”[/purple][/sine]

What do you do?

You're dead tired and take a nap...

...only to be awoken by [gold][jitter]something wriggling around[/jitter][/gold] on top of you!

You hack and slash your way through the jungle but it goes on and on...

You sustain yourself on [green]strange fruits[/green], [orange]crunchy bugs[/orange], and drink the nectar of [aqua]glowing plants[/aqua] but you start feeling [jitter][red]paranoid...[/red][/jitter]

But then you find a clearing, a trail, and some [gold]Gold[/gold] coins scattered on the ground. Amongst the coins are some crudely-drawn maps!
Problem solved.

name: Doll Room
description:
You enter a hidden room...

It's packed with an array of dolls. Each are unique, their expressions ranging from [green]joy[/green] to [purple]sorrow[/purple], their attire spanning centuries and realms beyond your own.

A [sine][blue]chorus of whispers[/blue][/sine] grows louder and louder until [jitter][red]the dolls are shouting[/red][/jitter] over each other and calling for you...

You must choose one and leave immediately.

options.title: Examine Each and Make the Best Choice

pages.description:
[blue]“You should be happy I chose you!”[/blue]
The doll proclaims triumphantly.

You examine each and every doll before you make your choice.

The shouting has reached a [red][jitter]piercing crescendo[/jitter][/red] but you manage to make a choice before going completely mad!

A warm voice happily fills your head.
[orange][sine]“We are going to uncover the most delightful stories together!”[/sine][/orange]

You enter a hidden room...

It's packed with an array of dolls. Each are unique, their expressions ranging from [green]joy[/green] to [purple]sorrow[/purple], their attire spanning centuries and realms beyond your own.

A [sine][blue]chorus of whispers[/blue][/sine] grows louder and louder until [jitter][red]the dolls are shouting[/red][/jitter] over each other and calling for you...

You must choose one and leave immediately.

options.title: Examine Each and Make the Best Choice

pages.description:
As you pick up the [sine][purple]worn-looking doll[/purple][/sine], all of the voices go silent.
This one doesn't speak.

Amid the shouting, you quickly examine the dolls.

One of these two may be good?
It's hard to concentrate through the [red]mental anguish[/red].

name: Doors of Light and Dark
description:
A doorway existed where none existed moments before...

You enter to find two shimmering doorways and a [gold]well-dressed doorman[/gold].
“Finally, a visitor! Please please! Choose a door, any door!”

[blue]Are we still in the Spire? How is this place so clean?[/blue]

pages.description:
[sine][purple]Into the darkness...[/purple][/sine]

You see nothing.
But this helps you think... You shed [red]pointless thoughts[/red].

You're back in the [blue]Underdocks[/blue].
How did you? Huh...?

A doorway existed where none existed moments before...

You enter to find two shimmering doorways and a [gold]well-dressed doorman[/gold].
“Finally, a visitor! Please please! Choose a door, any door!”

[blue]Are we still in the Spire? How is this place so clean?[/blue]

[sine][gold]Into the light...[/gold][/sine]

[jitter]It's blinding!![/jitter] But the light [gold]strengthens[/gold] you.

You're back in the [blue]Underdocks[/blue].
How did you? Huh...?

name: Drowning Beacon
description:
Crossing a dreamscape of rocks and still waters, you emerge to face a [sine]sinking lighthouse[/sine] emitting [purple]anti-light[/purple].

You can bottle up the [aqua][sine]eerily-glowing water[/sine][/aqua] that has pooled here or climb up the dilapidated structure to retrieve the [gold]lens[/gold].

pages.description:
Using a nearby bottle, you calmly scoop up the [aqua]glowing liquid[/aqua] as the lighthouse peacefully sinks into the mud.

Good thing you weren't in there.

You climb to the top of the lighthouse, unnerved by its steady sinking.

Upon reaching the [gold]lanthorn room[/gold], you start prying off the lens as the [purple]anti-light[/purple] [jitter][red]saps your vitality[/red][/jitter]!

Finally, you wring it free; the lighthouse stops sinking.

Crossing a dreamscape of rocks and still waters, you emerge to face a [sine]sinking lighthouse[/sine] emitting [purple]anti-light[/purple].

You can bottle up the [aqua][sine]eerily-glowing water[/sine][/aqua] that has pooled here or climb up the dilapidated structure to retrieve the [gold]lens[/gold].

name: Endless Conveyor
description:
You lumber into a shack with a bright but crooked sign that reads:
[aqua]“ENDLESS FEAST - PAY WHAT YOU HUNGER!”[/aqua]

Inside, a [orange]willowy multi-armed chef[/orange] is deftly preparing [green]bites of food[/green] and placing them onto a [sine]winding chitinous belt[/sine].

One of the chef's arms point to a sign:
[blue]40[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] each

options.title: Broke
options.description: You could eat more but you are out of [gold]Gold[/gold].

options.title: Grab Caviar off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Gain [green]4[/green] Max HP. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Clam Roll off the Belt
Grab Fried Eel off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add a random Colorless Card to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Golden Fysh off the Belt
Grab Jelly Liver off the Belt
Grab Seapunk Salad off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Add [gold]Feeding Frenzy[/gold] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Spicy Snappy off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card. Continue feasting!

options.title: Grab Suspicious Condiment off the Belt
options.description: Pay [red]40[/red] [gold]Gold[/gold]. Procure a random [gold]Potion[/gold]. Continue feasting!

pages.description:
You grab the [gold]Last Dish Title[/gold] from the belt and scarf it down.
[green]Tasty![/green]

You lumber into a shack with a bright but crooked sign that reads:
[aqua]“ENDLESS FEAST - PAY WHAT YOU HUNGER!”[/aqua]

Inside, a [orange]willowy multi-armed chef[/orange] is deftly preparing [green]bites of food[/green] and placing them onto a [sine]winding chitinous belt[/sine].

One of the chef's arms point to a sign:
[blue]40[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] each
Now that you've had your fill, you continue on your way.

Keeping your distance from a seat, you loiter in the shadows of the establishment's entrance.

[orange]The chef[/orange], unfazed, continues working. Studying this behavior and discipline, you seek to minimize unnecessary movement and emotion during combat.

name: The Merchant???
description: A suspicious merchant offers 9 fake relics at 42–58 gold each. Throwing a [gold]Foul Potion[/gold] starts a fight against The Merchant??? (165 HP). Winning rewards [gold]Fake Merchant's Rug[/gold] plus all unsold relics.
preconditions: Requires 100+ gold or a Foul Potion

name: Field of Man-Sized Holes
description:
The sudden sight of a massive field, [jitter]gouged with large outlines of bodies[/jitter], stops you in your tracks.

One of these outlines matches your own.

[sine][orange]It's perfect...[/orange][/sine]

options.title: Resist
options.description: Remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Normality[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

pages.description:
It's a snug fit, but you squeeze yourself into the hole...

The further you go, the [sine][purple]darker it becomes[/purple][/sine].
Eventually, you see a [gold]faint light[/gold] grow brighter and reveal the other side.

You step out unchanged, but now understand the [green]intimate secrets of life[/green].

The sudden sight of a massive field, [jitter]gouged with large outlines of bodies[/jitter], stops you in your tracks.

One of these outlines matches your own.

[sine][orange]It's perfect...[/orange][/sine]

options.title: Resist
options.description: Remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Normality[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

pages.description:
You walk past all the holes, even the one carved [orange]perfectly in your shape...[/orange]

Why didn't I go inside? What would have happened? Have I been in that hole before? Who made these holes?

[sine][red]What is... who... where?[/red][/sine]

name: Grave of the Forgotten
description:
There is a single grave with a [jitter][aqua]roiling blue flame[/aqua][/jitter]...

A prideful warrior died in battle but its soul is restless. It wants to keep fighting, you feel it [sine]begging[/sine] to journey with you.

But perhaps it's better for it to face the [red]truth[/red]?

options.title: Locked
options.description: You have no cards with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] that can be [purple]Enchanted[/purple].

options.title: Confront with Truth
options.description: Add [red]Decay[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] a card that [gold]Exhausts[/gold] with [purple]Soul's Power[/purple].

pages.description:
You place your hand on the grave and whisper...

[sine]“Ascend with me...”[/sine]

In response, the flames draw out from the grave and coalesce into a [aqua]burning soul[/aqua] and hover around you loyally.
It knows what you are, and wishes to escort you to your final destination.

You place your hand on the grave and whisper...

[sine]“Your fight is over...”[/sine]

In response, the soul crashes into yours and a [jitter][aqua]SOUL FIGHT[/aqua][/jitter] ensues!
Stunned by the countless battles you have endured, it concedes.

There is a single grave with a [jitter][aqua]roiling blue flame[/aqua][/jitter]...

A prideful warrior died in battle but its soul is restless. It wants to keep fighting, you feel it [sine]begging[/sine] to journey with you.

But perhaps it's better for it to face the [red]truth[/red]?

options.title: Locked
options.description: You have no cards with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] that can be [purple]Enchanted[/purple].

options.title: Confront with Truth
options.description: Add [red]Decay[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. [gold]Enchant[/gold] a card that [gold]Exhausts[/gold] with [purple]Soul's Power[/purple].

name: Hungry for Mushrooms
description:
[sine]How long has it been since you ate?
...wait, what's that fantastic smell?[/sine]

Following the scent, you reach a cozy campground with all manner of [green]tasty mushrooms[/green] being cooked! You don't consider the safety of eating these mushrooms because you are so hungry.
(So hungry that you don't notice the dead adventurer)

options.title: Big Mushroom
options.description: Obtain [gold]Big Mushroom[/gold]. Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]20[/blue]. At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] fewer cards.

options.title: Fragrant Mushroom
options.description: Obtain [gold]Fragrant Mushroom[/gold]. Upon pickup, lose [blue]15[/blue] HP and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random cards.

pages.description:
You bite into the [orange]Big Mushroom[/orange]. Its flesh is firm, starchy, and satisfying. The more you eat, the hungrier you become, as if the mushroom is feeding on your hunger.

[sine]So yummy... you enter a [red]food coma[/red].[/sine]
This gluttony will cost you.

You sample the [green]Fragrant One[/green], a small woody mushroom with a delicate scent of shellfish...

A burst of energy spurs you to run, jump, and [gold]rigorously train[/gold]!
Then, a sudden [red][jitter]stabbing pain[/jitter][/red] hits you as the living fungi struggles within you during its brief final moments.

[sine]How long has it been since you ate?
...wait, what's that fantastic smell?[/sine]

Following the scent, you reach a cozy campground with all manner of [green]tasty mushrooms[/green] being cooked! You don't consider the safety of eating these mushrooms because you are so hungry.
(So hungry that you don't notice the dead adventurer)

options.title: Big Mushroom
options.description: Obtain [gold]Big Mushroom[/gold]. Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by [blue]20[/blue]. At the start of each combat, draw [blue]2[/blue] fewer cards.

options.title: Fragrant Mushroom
options.description: Obtain [gold]Fragrant Mushroom[/gold]. Upon pickup, lose [blue]15[/blue] HP and [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random cards.

pages.description:
The [green]medley of mushrooms[/green] looks the most appetizing so you go for that.

[red][jitter]“MY MUSHROOMS!!”[/jitter][/red]

The adventurer, presumably dead, attacks you! You knock them out, and with a seasoning of guilt, finish the rest of the fine meal.

name: Infested Automaton
description:
There's a chamber filled with [red]dead robots[/red].

A lone automaton still has a [sine][aqua]faintly glowing core[/aqua][/sine] but it's engulfed by a grotesque, organic growth and doesn't respond.

pages.description:
There's a chamber filled with [red]dead robots[/red].

A lone automaton still has a [sine][aqua]faintly glowing core[/aqua][/sine] but it's engulfed by a grotesque, organic growth and doesn't respond.

By studying the [aqua]Glowing Automaton[/aqua] and how its inner workings are laid out, you realize that specific metals and their arrangements resist various ailments!

You apply this [blue]Technology[/blue] to yourself.

At the slightest touch of the [aqua]core[/aqua], you are [jitter]jolted by [gold]electricity[/gold][/jitter].

You scamper away, feeling [sine][purple]altered[/purple][/sine] from the experience.

name: Jungle Maze Adventure
description:
In a clearing, you run into a [green]Ragtag Group of Adventurers[/green] looking down and gesturing at a [purple]gigantic maze[/purple].

They offer to join forces with you in an [b]Epic Quest[/b] to loot the riches of this maze. As an experienced adventurer yourself, it's clear this maze is filled with [red][jitter]deadly traps[/jitter][/red] and [orange][sine]guardians[/sine][/orange].

It would be easier if you work together, but then you would have to split the loot.

pages.description:
In a clearing, you run into a [green]Ragtag Group of Adventurers[/green] looking down and gesturing at a [purple]gigantic maze[/purple].

They offer to join forces with you in an [b]Epic Quest[/b] to loot the riches of this maze. As an experienced adventurer yourself, it's clear this maze is filled with [red][jitter]deadly traps[/jitter][/red] and [orange][sine]guardians[/sine][/orange].

It would be easier if you work together, but then you would have to split the loot.

Everyone's face immediately lights up, including your own!

One of the adventurers turns out to be a bard!
You merrily waltz into the maze as [aqua]Aquid the squid wizard[/aqua] effortlessly disarms traps, while you and the [red]Grathorian fighter[/red] take out the [orange]spiky club-wielding guards[/orange] with ease.

This was the most joyous adventure of your life and you've made some truly [gold][sine]Great Memories[/sine][/gold].

Feeling misanthropic, you wordlessly walk past their now-frowning faces. One of them even [jitter][purple]shakes their fist[/purple][/jitter] at you.

The maze is not welcoming. You fall into a spike trap, you are struck by a massive log with spikes, and [orange]feisty creatures with spiky clubs[/orange] fight you along the entire journey.

You are sick of spikes, and consider teamwork for the next adventure.

name: The Lost Wisp
description:
In the distance is an odd sight. Mounds and mounds of [sine][red]deceased insects[/red][/sine], surrounding what looks to be a [orange]small glowing mote[/orange].
It seems to be an effective attractant for all manner of bugs but you see it lash out some flames!

You move closer to investigate.

options.title: Capture the Wisp
options.description: Add [red]Decay[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain the [gold]Lost Wisp[/gold].

pages.description:
You approach the [orange]Wisp[/orange] cautiously...
The closer you get, the more it reacts to your presence.

When in arm's reach, you grasp the [orange]Wisp[/orange] but it [red][jitter]scalds you with a blast of hot steam and flame![/jitter][/red]

Still, you [jitter]fumble and wrestle[/jitter] the creature into submission. Eventually, the [orange]Wisp[/orange] concedes and recognizes you as its new owner.

In the distance is an odd sight. Mounds and mounds of [sine][red]deceased insects[/red][/sine], surrounding what looks to be a [orange]small glowing mote[/orange].
It seems to be an effective attractant for all manner of bugs but you see it lash out some flames!

You move closer to investigate.

options.title: Capture the Wisp
options.description: Add [red]Decay[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain the [gold]Lost Wisp[/gold].

pages.description:
You decide to leave the little one alone. Better play it safe!

Not much is in the area, but you find some [gold]gold[/gold] scattered amongst the dead bugs.
You don't seek an answer.

name: Luminous Choir
description:
You stumble upon a clearing bathed in an unnatural blue glow. Towering mushrooms pulse with bioluminescence, their caps swollen and glistening. As you approach, the fungi begin to emit [sine][purple]haunting, melodic tones[/purple][/sine] that reverberate throughout your chest.

You notice something gleaming, embedded within the largest mushroom's flesh, [sine]pulsing[/sine] in rhythm with the fungal song.

options.title: Reach into the Flesh
options.description: Remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Spore Mind[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

pages.description:
You stumble upon a clearing bathed in an unnatural blue glow. Towering mushrooms pulse with bioluminescence, their caps swollen and glistening. As you approach, the fungi begin to emit [sine][purple]haunting, melodic tones[/purple][/sine] that reverberate throughout your chest.

You notice something gleaming, embedded within the largest mushroom's flesh, [sine]pulsing[/sine] in rhythm with the fungal song.

options.title: Reach into the Flesh
options.description: Remove [blue]2[/blue] cards from your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Add [red]Spore Mind[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold].

pages.description: Placing gold upon the spongy ground. The coins slowly sink as tendrils gently push the relic to the surface, allowing a clean retrieval.

You plunge your hand directly into the spongy tissue of the dominant mushroom to extract the relic within. The fungal network shudders at your intrusion, and your mind [sine]quivers[/sine] in response.

name: Morphic Grove
description:
You enter a grove of [green]crystalline trees[/green], and they begin to [jitter]quiver excitedly[/jitter]!
A chorus of [sine]hellos and welcomes[/sine] bombard you as a group of [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] [jitter]burst[/jitter] forth from trees.

One of the [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] is fidgeting in the corner, clearly not as sociable as the others.

Approach the group or the loner?

pages.description:
You greet the chittering [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] and they embrace you into their crystally arms.

They share their combined knowledge and inject you with [sine]Morphic Magic[/sine], changing your nature... Such lovely creatures, these [aqua]Morphics[/aqua].

[red]One of them stole your[/red] [gold]gold[/gold][red].[/red]

You enter a grove of [green]crystalline trees[/green], and they begin to [jitter]quiver excitedly[/jitter]!
A chorus of [sine]hellos and welcomes[/sine] bombard you as a group of [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] [jitter]burst[/jitter] forth from trees.

One of the [aqua]Morphics[/aqua] is fidgeting in the corner, clearly not as sociable as the others.

Approach the group or the loner?

You reach out a hand to the lone [aqua]Morphic[/aqua], sympathizing with its nature.
It gifts you a tiny crystal fruit, and you consume it, as is custom.

The fruit clarifies your mind and purpose. You give thanks, then make your way onwards.

name: Neow
description:
[sine]I’ve... remade you....
...go... ..up.....[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: [sine]...hello... ..again.....[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
[sine]...awaken...
..Awaken.....[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
[sine]..receive.... this....
..blessing.. ...go......[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: [sine]..I’ve... ..brought... ..you back...[/sine]

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: [sine]...kill.. the... [red][jitter]ARCHITECT[/jitter][/red][/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
[sine]..arise.. my.. warrior...
..time... to fight...again...[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [sine]..still.. lost.. to rage... good...[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
[sine]..remember.. the.. first..time
...you ..came...before me..[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [sine]..so..furious...[/sine]

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: [sine]...so..useful...[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [sine]...we.... share... ..the same... ..goal....[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: [jitter]HE KILLED ALL THAT I LOVE!![/jitter]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [sine]...my power..... is yours...[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: [sine]He... still.. ....breathes...[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: [sine]Is... it.. ...even... possible...?[/sine]

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
[sine]... [red]Architect[/red].... ..weakening....
..we.... stronger...[/sine]

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Oversized blue creature, I am the future [orange]King[/orange]!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
[sine]..cute...
...you... will see.. ..me... ...again....[/sine]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: [sine]...again..?[/sine]

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: [jitter]Why can’t I win?![/jitter]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: [sine]...receive.. this... ..blessing...[/sine]

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: ...yes, thank you Neow.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
[sine]...returned.. from... outside?
..knew... you’d... be back...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
[sine]...your..
 ...trophy.. awaits...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: [sine]..both...know..agony..of..family...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
[sine]..still...seeking..approval...?
...[jitter]FOOLISH[/jitter]...[/sine]

name: Nonupeipe
description:
I haven’t had a visitor in a millennia!
You’re looking quite drab, here, let’s find something delightful for you to wear.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Madness awaits at the top. Don my power and vanquish.

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text:
You’ve traveled so far to reach me!
Come closer, receive my blessing.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Could a construct truly be worthy of my blessings?
Come forward, Defect. You will be the most beautiful of all automata.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: My poor, battered machine, let me refine you.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text: I usually don’t like the Architect’s things, but I admit you’re growing on me.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Ah, the Ironclad finally arrives before me.
Come forth and I shall endow you with my power.

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Ironclad ironclad... was my previous gift not enough?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
You return again my champion? How many times?
Were you not strong enough to wipe out entire clans before?

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Your guards are dead, rumors say you can bestow blessings for those who wish the Architect dead.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
I appreciate someone capable and shall grant a measure of my power.
Next time, don’t kill my guards.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: A mage needs fine accouterments for battle. Come forth, Necrobinder.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: The Architect won’t be pleased to see that [sine]pet[/sine] of yours.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: Do you mean Osty? He will be the one to deliver the final blow.

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: I seek audience with Nonupeipe!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Such beautiful robes you’ve brought from faraway lands!
Have your minions bring you closer and I will bless thee.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Royal blessings for royal visitors.
Servants! Fetch some tea for us.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: The Architect has gone mad! If only a noble champion could save us from this plight...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
Fear not! I, the Regent, will put an end to the madness!
But first, tea!

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
A little thief has snuck into my domain?
Don’t think I can’t see you? Come on out!

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: The Silent steps out of the shadows...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
A huntress, what beckons your return to the Spire?
Approach and don these blessings.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: I have prepared gifts for you, assassin, don’t be shy.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Of all of her puppets, you surprise me most.

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
What took your first life? Did Neow [sine]find[/sine] you?
A shame you don’t speak.

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
I haven’t had a visitor in a millennia!
You’re looking quite drab, here, let’s find something delightful for you to wear.

name: Orobas
description: Puppet puppet!! All the way up here?! Take these, take take!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Try this!!!

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Very good finds!! Look look!

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
What! Servant construct?! Still working!!
Why here? Why not at Factory??

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Core broken? Neow use broken construct?
Manipulated?

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: An Ironclad!? How possible?? Scary. Very scary!!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: Contract signer? Why!? Bad choice? Yes. Mistake!

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Wishing you freedom!! Wishing hard!
Vakuu bad. Very bad! Architect free you?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Dead?! Not dead! Why puppet? Big hand!!

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text:
I’m no puppet. There’s a man I must kill.
What can you do for me?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Killing bad!! Take this instead!

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Not dead one! Good gifts for you!! Violence bad.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: No violence! Collect shiny instead... Shiny!!

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text:
My quest will only end when the Architect is no more.
Violence is inevitable.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Architect not bad! Maybe talk? Talking good!! Very good!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Traveller! From space!? Where in space?
How from space? Pointy head! Little friends!!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: The Regent monologues for hours.

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Exciting! Impressive!! More! More!!!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
More stories! Found these for you!
Now tell more story!!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
My number one fan! Orobas, friend!
Lovely to see you’re still alive!

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Stories?!

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Of course of course... but have you found any trinkets for me?

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Infection...? [jitter]BLIGHT!?[/jitter] Take and go!!

Silent.speaker: character
Silent.text: [sine]...[/sine]

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text: Not contagious? Very dying? Architect help you?

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Where sisters? Scary mean sisters!
Be good person! Don’t be like sisters!!

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text: Puppet puppet!! All the way up here?! Take these, take take!

name: Pael
description:
A puppet has arrived?
Can you check on Father? I’m too tired...

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Welcome back friend. Let my flesh help you...

Returning.speaker: ancient
Returning.text: Pael is sleeping. His snoring shakes the room.

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Troubled automaton, looking for your friend?
Let me help...

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
Do constructs dream?
Watch and copy me...

Defect.speaker: ancient
Defect.text:
I dreamt of your friend...
Father can restore [aqua]Flaw[/aqua]...

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text: You contain such rage. Take from me and find some peace...

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
Do you remember how it feels to dream?
It is good to sleep...

Ironclad.speaker: ancient
Ironclad.text:
You must quell your flames.
Father can free you...

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Such malice paints your heart.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: We would share the same paint if you knew what’s befallen me.

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
There is no peace on your path.
Take a part of me to ease your burdens...

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text:
The one with the Hand returns.
Painful memories. Take my strength and leave...

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: Killing [red]Father[/red] won’t bring peace.

Necrobinder.speaker: character
Necrobinder.text: You call that [jitter]thing[/jitter] your father!?

Necrobinder.speaker: ancient
Necrobinder.text: We do not choose our family...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
Hello! I am the Regent.
Hellooo?? [jitter]HELLO!?[/jitter]

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
Quiet down now.
Take a part of me and be on your way...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text:
I’m back! Ah, you’re asleep of course.
Let’s see here...

Regent.speaker: character
Regent.text: Why do you give yourself away?

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text: Why not give when I have an abundance of flesh?

Regent.speaker: ancient
Regent.text:
When you return, I will be replenished anew.
That’s what sleep does...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Murderous creature, no need for violence here.
Have part of me and find peace...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
Trophy hunting? Sure, take a part of me...
Whatever grants you comfort...

Silent.speaker: ancient
Silent.text:
You’ve poisoned me...?
What is this going to...? zZZzz...

First Visit.speaker: ancient
First Visit.text:
A puppet has arrived?
Can you check on Father? I’m too tired...

name: Potion Courier
description:
There is a [sine]sour[/sine] smell in the air and shortly after, you find a [gold]Potion Courier[/gold] collapsed on the ground.
Unmoving. Lifeless. [jitter]Dead!?[/jitter]
While their belongings have been ransacked, there is a batch of [green][sine]Foul Smelling Potions[/sine][/green] with a note: "Recipient: Merchant".

pages.description: What could the [blue]Merchant[/blue] want with these potions?

There is a [sine]sour[/sine] smell in the air and shortly after, you find a [gold]Potion Courier[/gold] collapsed on the ground.
Unmoving. Lifeless. [jitter]Dead!?[/jitter]
While their belongings have been ransacked, there is a batch of [green][sine]Foul Smelling Potions[/sine][/green] with a note: "Recipient: Merchant".
Only a single potion was intact.

name: Punch Off
description:
Two [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold] are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them...

Should you try to nab it?

options.title: Nab
options.description: Add [red]Injury[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

pages.description:
Two [gold]Punch Constructs[/gold] are duking it out and you see some treasure in between them...

Should you try to nab it?

options.title: Nab
options.description: Add [red]Injury[/red] to your [gold]Deck[/gold]. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

pages.description:
The [gold]Constructs[/gold] turn to you menacingly!

You put your dukes up.

You successfully nab the relic!

...or so you thought. A right-hook [jitter][red]clocks you in the face[/red][/jitter].

name: Ranwid the Elder
description:
You are approached by the [purple]oldest person you have ever seen[/purple].
[sine]“We meet once more... it's me, Ranwid!”[/sine]

You do not know this man.

options.title: Locked
options.description: You don't have any Potions that can be given.

options.title: Locked
options.description: You don't have any Relics that can be given.

pages.description:
[sine]“Mag.. nificent...”[/sine]

Ranwid mumbles while chewing the [gold]gold[/gold].

You are approached by the [purple]oldest person you have ever seen[/purple].
[sine]“We meet once more... it's me, Ranwid!”[/sine]

You do not know this man.

options.description: You don't have any Potions that can be given.

How can a place like this exist?

You reach forth and meld into the reflection in front of you.
[sine]Which one am I?[/sine]

name: Room Full of Cheese
description:
This room is full of [b][jitter]cheese!!![/jitter][/b]

You look around to see if there are any traps and above you is... more [b]cheese[/b]. The candles in this room appear to be made of [b]cheese[/b]. The furniture is also [b]cheese[/b].
Suddenly, the door behind you slams shut.

It is made of [b]cheese[/b].

pages.description:
You take a little nibble of [b]cheese[/b] but this fuels you to eat even more [b]cheese[/b].

[sine]Time passes...[/sine]

 You have eaten an awe-inspiring amount of [b]cheese[/b].
Tonight, dreams will be [b]cheese[/b].

Time slips by as your mind travels to strange places from the sheer presence of all this [b]cheese[/b], and you fade into a stupor....
You snap awake and realize you're holding something.

[b]The Chosen Cheese.[/b]

name: The Round Tea Party
description:
You find an [orange]invitation[/orange] for a [blue]“Sir Galalot”[/blue] to a tea party and decide to show up in his stead.

Upon entering an unassuming rotunda, you find yourself in the midst of [gold]commanders[/gold], [aqua]generals[/aqua], [red]warlords[/red], and [blue]mercenaries[/blue] having... tea?
The gigantic knight donning a [gold]golden crown[/gold] speaks.

[jitter]“Thou art late for [b]Tea[/b]?!”[/jitter]

pages.description:
The patrons stare wide-eyed at the corpse of one of their regulars... then [jitter]bursts into applause!?[/jitter]

“We were wondering how to rid of [red]Sir Wygore[/red], incredible work!”

They dump out your [green]poisoned tea[/green] and you discuss [orange]tactics[/orange] and [purple]secrets[/purple] all night. A most excellent tea party.

You grab a teacup and down it one go.
It's [jitter][red]SCALDING HOT[/red][/jitter] but you don't change your expression. The patrons are stunned by your lack of self preservation.

“We meant no offense, [blue]Sir Galalot[/blue]. our sincerest apologies.”

You enjoy some tea and crumpets, unaware of the [green]poison[/green] you've ingested.

You find an [orange]invitation[/orange] for a [blue]“Sir Galalot”[/blue] to a tea party and decide to show up in his stead.

[jitter]“Thou art late for [b]Tea[/b]?!”[/jitter]

They all point their weapons at you-

“At least pay the [gold]entrance fee[/gold] if you want to live.”

You jump onto the table and [jitter]kick[/jitter] the [red]warlord knight[/red] in the face!
 The knight lets out a haunting shriek and keels over.

[jitter][purple]*everyone gasps*[/purple][/jitter]

name: Sapphire Seed
description:
You narrowly avoid stepping on a bright, sharp... seed? Its unmistakable color gives away that it's a [aqua]Sapphire Seed[/aqua]! Weren't these incredible seeds supposed to be extinct!?

Legends say that consuming one can greatly [gold]amplify your endurance[/gold], but what if you plant and nourish it instead?

options.title: Consume
options.description: Heal [green]9[/green] HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a card in your [gold]Deck[/gold].

pages.description:
You ingest the [aqua]Sapphire Seed[/aqua] and within moments your [blue]limbs feel more agile[/blue], [gold]colors sharpen[/gold], and you [purple][sine]sense the souls of nearby foes[/sine][/purple].

Good thing you didn't step on it.

pages.description:
You scour the [green]Overgrowth[/green] and find a pot with [blue]good aeration[/blue]. Then, you trek around, searching for an untouched spot where [orange]light peeks through a cracked wall[/orange]. Carefully, you reinforce the pot with bark and vine to [green]camouflage[/green] it, fill it with loamy, nutrient-rich soil, and nestle the [aqua]seed[/aqua] just beneath the surface.

Finally, you gather dew from nearby plants and pour it over the soil.

[sine]Grow big, little seed...[/sine]
Unknowingly, the [aqua]Sapphire Seed[/aqua] attaches to you spiritually.
Thankful of your hard work.

Will you read it?

What an engrossing read! Some choice quotes remain fresh in your mind:
“Avoid big monsters.”
“Take every card.”
“Blocking is for cowards.”

Your hands are covered in [red]blood[/red].

You flip to a random page:
“Defense 101: Don't get hit!”

You read the rest of the passage and it's surprisingly illuminating. You incorporate these ideas into your battle tactics.

You flip the book over and read the summary:
[blue]“Critics and Cultists agree that sharp and pointy weapons are the best way to inflict damage!”[/blue]

There's a price sticker on the back of the book, crossed out and marked with a greatly reduced price.

name: Spiraling Whirlpool
description:
You happen upon a [aqua][sine]Massive Spiraling Whirlpool[/sine][/aqua]. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.

[purple][sine]Around and around... around...
....and around.... what a sight......[/sine][/purple]

What do you do?

pages.description:
You cup your hands and dip it into the [sine][aqua]Spiraling Whirlpool[/aqua][/sine].

Its waters fill your hands at a gentle rate as you take small sips with your eyes closed.

Delicious water [sine]spirals[/sine] through you to your [gold]Center[/gold], washing away harmful thoughts and physical ailments...

You happen upon a [aqua][sine]Massive Spiraling Whirlpool[/sine][/aqua]. The water swirls with beautiful precision and its surrounding walls are adorned with spiral patterns.

[purple][sine]Around and around... around...
....and around.... what a sight......[/sine][/purple]

What do you do?

[sine][purple]...ah-   so beautiful.....
So it spins... still spinning around. Yes...
Oh! Was that..... a little splash...?
....of course. You deserve some fun, too[/purple] [aqua]Mr. Spiral[/aqua][purple]... haha...
... .......   ...[/purple][/sine]

It's time to go now.
You whisper something as you take your leave.

[gold]“Thank you, Spiral.”[/gold]

description:
Above, a cocoon is [jitter]shaking and wriggling[/jitter], about to burst forth!

...it stops wriggling. [orange][sine]The cocoon ignites[/sine][/orange]! [jitter]What is going on?[/jitter]
In a flash of [gold]light[/gold] and [red]flame[/red], a [orange]Spirit Grafter[/orange] rushes into you, threatening to merge with your being to become complete.

The [orange]Spirit Grafter[/orange] merges with you. The vital kindred spirit swiftly [green]heals[/green] you up.

You are [blue]reborn[/blue].

The [orange]Spirit Grafter[/orange] is easily stopped by your will.

However, it repeatedly flies into you, desperate for a host. Its strength runs out and it dissolves with a [purple][sine]poof[/sine][/purple].

[sine]A fleeting spirit.[/sine]

description:
A massive boulder sits in the middle of an abandoned courtyard.

A plaque reads:
[gold][b]Stone of All Time[/b][/gold].

Its presence, shape, and adornments indicate that this courtyard was built around this [blue]Stone[/blue] and that it has never moved from this spot.

name: The Sunken Statue
description:
You spot an aged statue half submerged in a pond; its hands gently rest atop a [blue]stone sword[/blue].

Something is also [gold][sine]glittering[/sine][/gold] at the bottom of the pond.
Votive offerings perhaps?

You could really use some money...

pages.description:
You plunge deep into the water!

While collecting the [gold]offerings[/gold] you hear a [sine][blue]dull echo[/blue][/sine] and you're struck by stones!

Once you surface, you see that the old statue had crumbled due to your disturbance; [red]physical[/red] and [purple]spiritual[/purple].

You [jitter]wrest[/jitter] the [blue]sword[/blue] out of the statue's hands and the whole thing crumbles apart!

It's too dangerous to pick up whatever was [gold][jitter]glittering[/jitter][/gold] at the bottom of the pond now...

Inspecting the [blue]sword[/blue], you sense an incredible [green]dormant power[/green] within.

[gold]The Second Chest:[/gold] Enormous, ornate, and clearly [red]cursed[/red]. Lots of gold!

[sine]All of the [/sine][blue]Merchant's[/blue][sine] wares can be bought...[/sine]
[Monologue]
[sine]Dangerous thugs can be paid off...[/sine]

The [red][sine]feverishly greedy[/sine][/red] thoughts stay with you forever...

[sine]Approach...[/sine]

...? Where did it go?

name: Tablet of Truth
description:
You defeat a pair of [blue]Guardian Kin[/blue] and make your way into a protected vault.

Inside is a [purple][sine]tablet with familiar inscriptions[/sine][/purple]. Your intuition tells you that this language can be deciphered rather easily... However, once you begin deciphering you'll be locked in.

The tablet gives off a soothing energy and you can smash it to receive its [green]healing energies[/green] instead.

options.title: Decipher
options.description: Lose [red]3[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.

options.title: Give Up
options.description: Stop reading the text and leave.

pages.description:
As you begin deciphering the tablet, the [blue]Kin's Mantra[/blue] speaks to you.

“The [gold]Truth[/gold] is everything...”

options.title: Continue Deciphering
options.description: Lose [red]6[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.

pages.description:
You feel faint from all this reading!

[purple][sine]Heroes weren't meant to read for such an extended period of time...[/sine][/purple]

options.title: Keep Deciphering
options.description: Lose [red]12[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.

pages.description:
[sine][red]You're barely holding on...[/red][/sine]
The tablet is nearly deciphered. The [blue]Mantra[/blue] holds the truth... 

[jitter]THE TRUTH!! WHAT IS THE TRUTH!?[/jitter]

options.title: KEEP DECIPHERING
options.description: Lose [red]24[/red] Max HP. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] a random card.

pages.description:
In a trance, you decipher the remaining text, abandoning mind and body. [purple][sine]The spiritual pursuit of the [gold]Truth[/gold] is all that matters.[/sine][/purple]

Or does it? One final word remains...
[jitter]It will cost everything.[/jitter]

options.title: Lose Everything
options.description: Set Max HP to [red]1[/red]. [gold]Upgrade ALL[/gold] cards.

pages.description:
[red][jitter]Everything was spent[/jitter][/red] to decipher the [gold]Final Word[/gold] and you black out...
When you come to, you realize something is etched into the floor.

[b]“Air”[/b]
You stop all this reading and deciphering. Your body normalizes, though you can't help but wonder what the [gold]Truth[/gold] was.

name: Tea Master
description:
You stumble into a dimly lit shack and find yourself immersed in a very peaceful space containing an obsessive variety of tea.

The man inside gestures to a selection of [green]teas[/green], each neatly labeled with a [gold]premium price[/gold].

[gold]1.[/gold] Water from a charcoal-filled carafe is ladled into a kettle.
[gold]2.[/gold] The kettle is heated using a gentle [purple]violet flame[/purple].
[gold]3.[/gold] A scoop of tea goes into the kettle before it boils.
[gold]4.[/gold] Off the heat, and a series of rhythmic claps track the time.
[gold]5.[/gold] The kettle is hoisted high and precisely poured into a tiny cup.

[green][sine]“Tea is served.”[/sine][/green]
